description_long: This object is a blocky, stylized shotgun with a long, rectangular barrel and a compact, angular receiver. The barrel is extended and appears to be fitted with a suppressor or elongated muzzle, giving it a distinctive silhouette. The receiver section is boxy, with subtle stepped details and a clear separation between the barrel and grip area. The coloration is primarily dark gray and black, with some lighter gray highlights on the receiver, suggesting a utilitarian, modern design. The grip is integrated into the main body, lacking a traditional stock, and the trigger area is minimally defined. The overall form is geometric and simplified, with no visible moving parts or detailed mechanisms.
description: A blocky, modern shotgun with a long, rectangular barrel and compact, angular receiver in dark gray and black tones. The design is stylized and lacks a traditional stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the long barrel and compact, angular receiver.
description_view_1: Barrel-end view emphasizing the rectangular, elongated barrel and the narrow profile of the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same long barrel and receiver, with stepped details visible on the receiver.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver and grip area, with the barrel extending away from the viewer.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long rectangular barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rectangular, integrated into the receiver with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
